REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUL-15-2002 IN DEPT. 602 - JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, REPORTER RHONDA FUNG, CLERK IRIS HAMMER & ATTYS FOR PARTIES PRESENT WITH PARTIES. COURT TRIAL HELD. COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF IN AMOUNT OF $35,306.90 MINUS $2,800 PLUS 10% INTEREST AND ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS TO BE PAID BY DFT. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PARTIES. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT PROPOSED JUDGMENT TO THE COURT. EACH SIDE IS TO PAY $90.00 PER DIEM FEES.
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS (SUMMARY)
